member_group_no.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

root.sql: select member_group_no ,member_group_name ,paid_status from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where member_group_no in ( select member_group_fin from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ) /*WHERE*/ --and member_group_no between :as_group1 and :as_group2 order by member_group_no
